game_name: Where in the World Is Carmen Sandiego?

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Jump/Duck Evasion
special_mechanics.description: Master System version only: player sprite must duck or jump to avoid knife and gun attacks from henchmen and Carmen's gang. Hits result in time recovery penalty.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical data. This is primarily a menu-driven educational geography game, not a character action platformer. Movement mechanics are minimal. Master System version adds sprite-based evasion gameplay, but precise physics parameters are not documented. No technical movement data available in source material.
